description: Maps every consumed CKAN endpoint and every catalog entry to the contract-test ID that validates it. CI fails if any endpoint or catalog entry lacks a corresponding test (Constitution VIII).

endpoints.name: resource_get
endpoints.testId: tests/integration/sync-bootstrap-resync.test.ts#captures all resources fresh; second run skips unchanged content

datasetSchemas.name: tabular
datasetSchemas.testId: tests/contract/curated-tabular-artifact.test.ts#CSV curator output validates against curated-tabular-artifact.schema.json shape

explorerEndpoints.name: GET /healthz
explorerEndpoints.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/app.test.ts#GET /healthz reports degraded when the default provider is absent

explorerEndpoints.name: GET /api/datasets
explorerEndpoints.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/app.test.ts#GET /api/datasets lists all, no auth header required

explorerEndpoints.name: GET /api/datasets/:datasetId/resources/:resourceId/rows
explorerEndpoints.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/app.test.ts#GET resource rows returns content; missing resource 404

explorerEndpoints.name: GET /api/regions
explorerEndpoints.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/app.test.ts#GET /api/regions aggregates per oblast with deduped counts

explorerEndpoints.name: POST /api/chat
explorerEndpoints.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/chat-route.test.ts#streams a grounded answer with citations + anchors from tool results

explorerEndpoints.name: POST /api/auth/callback
explorerEndpoints.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/app.test.ts#POST /api/auth/callback materializes the app user + reports the tier

explorerEndpoints.name: POST /api/auth/logout
explorerEndpoints.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/app.test.ts#POST /api/auth/logout returns the Kratos logout URL

explorerChatTools.name: mirrorSearch
explorerChatTools.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/chat-route.test.ts#mirrorSearch returns in-scope datasets and records ids

explorerChatTools.name: mirrorInfo
explorerChatTools.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/chat-route.test.ts#mirrorInfo returns detail in scope, outOfScope marker otherwise

explorerChatTools.name: readResource
explorerChatTools.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/chat-route.test.ts#readResource reads rows in scope, blocks out of scope

explorerBenchmarks.name: grounding SC-004/005/006
explorerBenchmarks.testId: apps/explorer-api/tests/grounding-benchmark.test.ts#meets SC-004/005/006 across the known-answer query set
